/opt/MatrixMCU/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc  -DSTM32F446xx -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -Wall -Wextra -Werror -Wno-unused-parameter -g -O0 -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -T/mnt/c/ASUAREZ/Programacion/SDG/SDG2/MatrixMCU/projects/simone/../../ld/stm32f446re.ld -specs=nano.specs -lc -lm -Wl,-Map=project.map,--cref -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage -Wl,--no-warn-rwx-segment -specs=rdimon.specs -lrdimon CMakeFiles/test_template.dir/test_template.c.obj CMakeFiles/test_template.dir/__/__/port/stm32f4/src/interr.c.obj -o /mnt/c/ASUAREZ/Programacion/SDG/SDG2/MatrixMCU/projects/simone/bin/stm32f446re/Debug/test_template.elf  ../../libunity.a ../../libproject-common.a ../../libproject-port.a ../../libfsm.a ../../libproject-common.a ../../libfsm.a
